def encode_messages(messages, encoding="utf-8"):
    header = "MSG:".encode(encoding)
    results = []
    for msg in messages:
        payload = msg.encode(encoding)
        results.append(header + payload)
    return results


def build_packets(chunks):
    prefix = b"\x00\x01\x02\x03"
    packets = []
    for chunk in chunks:
        encoded = chunk.encode("utf-8")
        length = len(encoded).to_bytes(4, "big")
        packets.append(prefix + length + encoded)
    return packets
